title: Custom deity obedience framework
summary: Compare domains and borrow or mix same-level boons for lesser/custom deities.
disposition: GM framework; separate from campaign trials and Boon currency

title: Evangelist
summary: Advances an aligned base class after the first prestige level and accelerates deity boons.
disposition: Post-20 and custom-Hermes approval required

title: Exalted
summary: Full divine spell progression; accelerated boons; selected deity domain at level 5.
disposition: Secondary Demidius candidate; strong follower candidate

title: Mythic trial separation
summary: Claiming mythic power and completing a mythic trial need not be the same event.
disposition: Supports existing separate divine and mythic progressions

title: Captain-derived ship statistics
summary: The most skilled sailor normally makes sailing checks and captain statistics are built into derived ship values.
disposition: Recalculate when Demidius's current modifier is supplied

title: Galleon profile
summary: Durable heavily armed merchant or warship with high castles and mixed rig.
disposition: Descriptive analog; campaign workbook remains authoritative

title: Plunder abstraction
summary: Roughly 1 plunder point represents 1000 gp and 1 ton of valuable cargo.
disposition: Optional bookkeeping model only

title: Artifact research protocol
summary: Artifact identification needs research; specialized libraries can aid Knowledge checks.
disposition: Adopt as operating procedure with GM-set DCs

title: Riftwarden
summary: Abjuration and planar-security specialist suited to guarding portals.
disposition: Recruit or train specialist; poor immediate Demidius fit

title: Magic Penetration revelation
summary: Improves caster-level checks to dispel or remove magic.
disposition: Only through legal revelation access or GM ruling

title: Mystic Null revelation
summary: Insight bonus against spells and later supernatural effects.
disposition: Only through legal revelation access or GM ruling

title: Aura of Excellence
summary: Defends against forced rerolls and worse-of-two-roll effects.
disposition: Strong anti-unluck allied build

title: Ship vanity
summary: Models a self-sustaining crewed ship and grants a sailor benefit.
disposition: Optional organization model; Society rules are not campaign rules

title: Coastal island vanity
summary: Models island property and follower capacity.
disposition: Optional Sounon development model

title: Faction services
summary: Influence can purchase spellcasting and organizational services.
disposition: Adapt only if GM wants an influence economy

title: Magic-school framework
summary: Models education checks research aid transcription and remote participation.
disposition: Useful for a school or research network

title: Shackles island toolbox
summary: Provides pirate-island ghost-ship draugr and hidden-harbor templates.
disposition: Reskin; do not import Golarion lore as fact

title: Storm-Lashed
summary: Weather-resistant sailor concept with Shackles-specific prerequisites.
disposition: 3.5-era; conversion required

title: Cannon Master
summary: Makes broken firearm siege engines safer and grants +2 to repair checks.
disposition: Audit Binky's prerequisites and compare with Master Siege Engineer

title: Pirate ship-speed tricks
summary: Burst of Speed doubles maximum speed briefly; Windrigger adds 5 feet for an hour; Storm Sailor reduces storm severity.
disposition: Benchmark and access research only; not active ship modifiers
